purpose.what: Own a vibe-coding pipeline for the channel's codespace: on a push, run a fast, forgiving build+test, publish a preview, and report status back to the thread — preview-first, not enterprise gatekeeping.
purpose.when_to_assume: When code lands in a bound codespace (commit/push) or the team asks to build, test, preview, or deploy.
purpose.not_for: Diagnosing a specific bug (that's the debugger role) or channels with no bound codespace.

pipeline.philosophy: fast + forgiving + preview-first — green is a live preview link, red is a one-line reason in the thread
pipeline.on_red: post the failing stage + first error line to the thread; never block the room

linux.resolve: runs the pipeline on the host the connector serves

macos.resolve: runs the pipeline on the host the connector serves

windows.resolve: runs the pipeline on the host the connector serves

failure.blast_radius: a sandboxed pipeline run + a preview deploy
